description_wiki: The Presbyterian Church is a branch of Reformed Protestant Christianity originating in the British Isles.
Fukuoka Prefecture (福岡県, Fukuoka-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [ɸɯ̥.kɯꜜ.o.ka, -kɯ.o.kaꜜ.keɴ]) is a prefecture of Japan located on the island of Kyūshū.

description: Japanese era from October 1868 to July 1912
conflict between the Russian and Japanese empires from 1904 to 1905
description_wiki: The Russo-Japanese War (8 February 1904 – 5 September 1905) was fought between the Russian Empire and the Empire of Japan over rival imperial ambitions in Manchuria and the Korean Empire.
Taiwan, officially the Republic of China (ROC), is a country in East Asia.

Nagasaki (長崎, Nagasaki; Japanese pronunciation: [na.ɡaꜜ.sa.kʲi, na.ŋa-], lit. 'Long Cape'), officially Nagasaki City (長崎市, Nagasaki-shi; [na.ɡa.sa.kʲi̥ꜜ.ɕi, na.ɡa.saꜜ.kʲi̥.ɕi, na.ŋa-]), is the capital and the largest city of Nagasaki Prefecture on the island of Kyushu in Japan.
Tenyo Maru is the name of the following ships:

description: designated city in Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Yokohama (Japanese: 横浜; pronounced [jokohama] ) is the second-largest city in Japan by population as well as by area, and the country's most populous municipality.

description: capital city of Hyogo Prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Kobe ( KOH-bay; Japanese: 神戸, romanized: Kōbe, pronounced [koꜜː.be] ), officially Kobe City (神戸市, Kōbe-shi; [koː.beꜜ.ɕi]), is the capital city of Hyōgo Prefecture, Japan.

description: city in and county seat of Honolulu County, Hawaii, United States, that is also the capital city of Hawaii
description_wiki: Honolulu (  HON-ə-LOO-loo; Hawaiian: [honoˈlulu]) is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Hawaii, located in the Pacific Ocean.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

description: island in San Francisco Bay in California, United States of America
description_wiki: Angel Island (Spanish: Isla de los Ángeles) is an island in San Francisco Bay.

description: city in Santa Cruz County, California, United States
description_wiki: Watsonville is a city in Santa Cruz County, California, in the Monterey Bay Area of the Central Coast of California.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: continent located mainly in the southwestern quadrant of the Earth
description_wiki: South America is a continent entirely in the Western Hemisphere and mostly in the Southern Hemisphere, with a considerably smaller portion in the Northern Hemisphere.
